candidates.rationale: `checkApiHealth` is an exported runtime helper with no references outside or inside its own declaration site. The repo-wide `rg` search only finds the export line, so this is dead executable code rather than just an unnecessary export.
candidates.recommended_action: Delete `checkApiHealth` from `frontend/src/api.ts`; if a health probe is still intended, add a real caller before keeping the helper.

candidates.rationale: `fetchDistrictRoom` is an exported runtime helper that is never called anywhere in the repo. The only repo-wide hit is its own declaration, which makes it dead executable code.
candidates.evidence: {'code_snippet': 'export async function fetchDistrictRoom(districtId: string): Promise<RoomState | null> {\n    return apiFetch<RoomState>(`/api/districts/${encodeURIComponent(districtId)}/room`);\n}'
candidates.recommended_action: Delete `fetchDistrictRoom` from `frontend/src/api.ts`; if an initial room read is still needed, wire it into the presence flow instead of keeping an unused wrapper.
